description: The construction company uses Snipe-IT to track its fleet of surveying drones. March is compliance month. As the UAS Operations Manager, create a new supplier named 'Federal Aviation Administration' with Email 'UAShelp@faa.gov'. Create a numeric Custom Field named 'Total Flight Hours' and add it to the 'UAV Metadata' fieldset. Update the Total Flight Hours for DRONE-001 (154), DRONE-002 (89), DRONE-003 (312), and DRONE-004 (41), and change the status of DRONE-003 to 'Out for Repair'. For each of the four drones, log an 'Annual FAA Registration' maintenance record (Type: Maintenance) with Supplier 'Federal Aviation Administration', Start and Completion Dates of '2026-03-08', and a Cost of '$5.00'. Finally, create a 'Repair' maintenance record for DRONE-003 titled 'Gimbal and Rotor Replacement' with Supplier 'DJI Enterprise Support', Start Date '2026-03-05', Cost '$450.00', and Notes 'Drone struck tree branch. Awaiting replacement parts.'
